meta.game: Golden State Warriors at LA Clippers

GS.headline: Clippers host the Warriors in play-in game
GS.description: Golden State Warriors (37-45, 10th in the Western Conference) vs. Los Angeles Clippers (42-40, ninth in the Western Conference)

GS.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship odds: Thunder, Celtics favored in respective conferences
GS.description: The Thunder are the favorites to win the NBA championship, and the Celtics are favored to represent the Eastern Conference.

GS.headline: NBA playoffs 2026: Previewing all 20 teams still vying for the title
GS.description: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

GS.headline: Clippers beat the Warriors 115-110 to clinch No. 9 seed and play-in tourney rematch
GS.description: — Bennedict Mathurin had 20 points, nine rebounds and eight assists off the bench, and the Los Angeles Clippers defeated the Golden State Warriors 115-110 on Sunday to set up a rematch in the play-in tournament.

GS.headline: Golden State Warriors vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights
GS.description: Golden State Warriors vs. LA Clippers: Game Highlights
